title: eryngium bithynicum
intro: Eryngium bithynicum, also known as the Bithynian eryngo, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids in its extracts. The health benefits of Eryngium bithynicum include potential anti-cancer, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a subject of interest for further research. In herbal preparations, Eryngium bithynicum is often used as a dried herb or in infusions, tinctures, or essential oils to harness its medicinal properties.
